data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recipient signature for high-value items.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for a recipient signature for high-value items, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for a recipient signature, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or testing, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of recipient signature functionality for high-value items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recipient signature requirement.
